card_description: The Palm Tree People is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Context: "Dick interprets his 3-74 experience through the lens of the Book of Daniel, identifying Richard Nixon with the "harsh and grim king" (the Master of Stratagems) whose "Iron Empire" (BIP) was broken by the "Uncut Stone" of God."
